name: elegant
description: a command line tool to build an Elegant Front End Architecture

scripts.test: cross-env CI=true concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-angular-ngrx && npm test --prefix templates/chota-angular-ngrx -- --watch=false" "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-react-redux && npm test --prefix templates/chota-react-redux" "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-react-rtk && npm test --prefix templates/chota-react-rtk" "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-react-saga && npm test --prefix templates/chota-react-saga" "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-vue-pinia && npm test --prefix templates/chota-vue-pinia" "npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix templates/chota-wc-saga && npm test --prefix templates/chota-wc-saga"
